info.name: Guardant Health EMR Integration (Illustrative Model)
info.description: Illustrative, unofficial Postman collection modeling Guardant Health's EMR-integrated ordering and results-delivery capability. Guardant Health does NOT publish a public, self-serve developer API or an official OpenAPI specification. Ordering and results integration is provisioned per institutional partner through Epic Aura and Flatiron OncoEMR. The requests below are a representative model of documented capabilities and are NOT confirmed public endpoints; there is no public base URL.

variable.description: Placeholder only. No public base URL is documented; endpoints are provisioned per institutional partner.

request.description: Illustrative electronic ordering of a Guardant assay from an integrated EMR. Not a confirmed public endpoint.
Illustrative retrieval of order status. Not a confirmed public endpoint.
Illustrative retrieval of molecular profiling results for a completed order. Not a confirmed public endpoint.
